message:
feat(freeze): Migrate more opcodes to C builder (Phase 4)

Migrate two more opcodes to use the structured CBuilder API:

1. get_loc_check - TDZ (Temporal Dead Zone) check with reference error
2. throw - exception throwing with trampoline support

Added new builder helpers:
- emitThrow(func, message) - generic throw for any error type
- emitThrowReferenceError(message) - for TDZ violations

The builder now handles 7 opcodes:
- iterator_check_object, iterator_close, inc_loc (Phase 3)
- get_loc_check, throw (Phase 4)
Plus the common helpers: emitExceptionCheck, emitErrorCheck

All 20 c_builder tests pass. Benchmarks:
- fib(45): 26.46ms AOT
- loop sumArray: 0.11ms AOT
